posts.author: kessi (Kessi A)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!

Big news from b-labs! We’re thrilled to introduce our latest creation: The Due Date Group Allocator App for monday.com! It’s here to revolutionize how you handle tasks and deadlines, making your workflow smoother and more efficient.

Here’s why you’ll love it:

  1. Automated Sorting: Tasks are sorted automatically based on due dates, saving you time.
  2. Fully Customizable: Tailor it to fit your team’s workflow with adjustable settings.
  3. Keep Projects on Track: Neatly organized tasks make overseeing project milestones a breeze.

To make it even easier, we are providing a FREE Task Management board to get you started.

image860×548 72.4 KB

Join the dozens of clients already loving it. Let’s elevate your project management together!

Here is a video on explaining how the Due Date Allocator app works
